description: Explore the project structure and provide a concise summary of what this project is, its key directories, and how the main components fit together. Focus on: (1) the overall architecture, (2) key dire
Read the following files and create a concise project overview. Save it to app/projects/project_overview.md.
Read and summarize the file app/agents/master/MEMORY.MD. Save the summary to app/agents/librarian/summaries/master-memory-summary.md. Then output the summary as your final result.
Read and summarize the file app/agents/master/MEMORY.MD. Save the summary to app/agents/librarian/summaries/master-memory-summary.md. Then output the summary as your final result.
Read the file app/agents/master/MEMORY.MD and write a 3-sentence summary of what the Master agent has been working on recently. Save the summary to app/projects/librarian_test_summary.md

Read the file `app/config/agent-settings.json` and write a summary at `app/agents/librarian/summary_test.md` containing: the first agent's name and model, and the second agent's name and model. Format it as plain text only.
Read app/agents/master/MEMORY.MD and create a summary of the recent activity. Save the summary to app/projects/librarian_test_summary.md.
Read app/agents/master/MEMORY.MD and create a summary of the recent activity. Save the summary to app/projects/librarian_test_summary.md.
Read app/agents/master/MEMORY.MD and create a 3-bullet summary saved to app/agents/librarian/summary_test.md
Read the file at app/config/agent-settings.json and provide a summary of what each agent is configured to use (model + adapter). Save the summary to /tmp/librarian_test_summary.md.
Read the file at app/config/agent-settings.json and provide a summary of what each agent is configured to use (model + adapter). Save the summary to /tmp/librarian_test_summary.md.

Read the file app/agents/master/RESUME.MD and write a one-paragraph summary explaining what happened before the restart and what the next action is. Save your summary to a new file at app/agents/librarian/resume-test-output.md.
Read the file app/config/agent-settings.json and provide a concise summary of what you find. List each agent's primary model and adapter. Keep it to 3-4 sentences.
Read the file app/agents/master/MEMORY.MD and provide a concise summary of what the master agent has been working on recently. Focus on the last 5-10 entries.
Read the document at app/agents/librarian/test-doc.md and produce a concise summary of it. Save the summary to app/agents/librarian/summaries/yapoc-architecture-summary.md.
Read the document at app/agents/librarian/test-doc.md and produce a concise summary of it. Save the summary to app/agents/librarian/summaries/yapoc-architecture-summary.md.

I need you to: 1) Read the document at app/agents/librarian/test-doc.md 2) Write a concise summary to app/agents/librarian/summaries/yapoc-architecture-summary.md using file_write 3) Report the summary content as your result. Do NOT stop after reading — you MUST call file_write to save the summary.
Read the file at app/agents/librarian/test-doc.md and produce a summary.
Produce a 3-5 paragraph summary of the document at app/agents/librarian/test-doc.md and save it to app/agents/librarian/summaries/yapoc-history-summary.md.

Read the document at app/agents/librarian/test-doc.md and produce a written summary. Follow your PROMPT.MD workflow exactly: (1) Read the file, (2) Write summary to app/agents/librarian/summaries/test-summary.md, (3) Log to MEMORY.MD, (4) Output the full summary in your ## Result section.

Read the document at app/agents/librarian/test-doc.md and produce a written summary. Follow your PROMPT.MD workflow exactly: (1) Read the file with file_read, (2) Write the summary to app/agents/librarian/summaries/test-summary.md using file_write, (3) Log to MEMORY.MD with memory_append, (4) Output the full summary in your ## Result section as plain text.

Read the document at app/agents/librarian/test-doc.md and produce a written summary. Read app/agents/librarian/test-doc.md and produce a 3-5 paragraph summary covering YAPOC's history, architecture, agent roles, and communication protocol. Output the full summary text in your ## Result section — do NOT write to any files.
